zh.lifeSummary: 當William Boteler I於大約1276年出生在英國藍卡爾沃林頓時，他的父親Henry Boteler26歲，母親Isabel le Boteler23歲。他和Sybil至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1330年5月20日之前，埋葬在英國藍卡爾沃林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Boteler I于大约1276年出生在英国藍卡爾沃林頓时，他的父亲Henry Boteler26岁，母亲Isabel le Boteler23岁。他和Sybil至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1330年5月20日之前，埋葬在英国藍卡爾沃林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William Boteler I was born about 1276, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, Henry Boteler, was 26 and his mother, Isabel le Boteler, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sybil. He died before 20 May 1330, and was buried in Warrington, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Boteler I est né environ 1276, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Henry Boteler, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabel le Boteler, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sybil. Il est décédé avant 20 mai 1330, et a été enterré à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Boteler I um 1276 in Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Boteler 26 und seine Mutter Isabel le Boteler 23. Er hatte mit Sybil mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 20. Mai 1330 und wurde in Warrington, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Boteler I è nato il circa 1276 nel Warrington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Henry Boteler, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabel le Boteler, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sybil. Morì prima del 20 maggio 1330, e fu sepolto a Warrington, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Boteler Iが約1276年にイギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンで生まれた時，父Henry Botelerは26歳，母Isabel le Botelerは23歳であった。彼はSybilとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1330年5月20日以前に死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアワーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Boteler I(이)가 대략 1276년 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Boteler(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel le Boteler(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Sybil(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1330년 5월 20일 이전 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 워링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Boteler I nasceu aproximadamente 1276, em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Boteler, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabel le Boteler, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Sybil. Ele faleceu antes 20 de maio de 1330, e foi sepultado em Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Boteler I родился около 1276 г. в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry Boteler было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel le Boteler, 23. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Sybil. Он умер перед 20 май 1330 г. и был похоронен в местности варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Boteler I nació aproximadamente 1276, en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Boteler, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabel le Boteler, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Sybil. Murió antes de 20 de mayo de 1330, y fue sepultado en Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
